system.notes:
The first interlocked cyborg body/ACPA — a 3.4m, 1.12-ton deep-black Arasaka prototype. Only a handful exist; none are fully proven, and deploying one would be an act of desperation. STR 52, SP 80, SDP 52; 810,000eb (the interlocked pair; 16D6+30 total Humanity Cost).

No human pilot: there is no life support at all. The suit requires an Alpha-class full-body conversion wired directly into it (buildable from the shipped Alpha Class body + Full Borg: Increased REF to 15, plus pain editors, combat programming, and sensor preprocessors). Because the pilot is hardwired rather than plugged in, the Reflex/Control operating caps do not apply: the suit boosts the pilot's REF 15 by +2 to an operating REF 17 (set the GM REF-cap override to 17 on a deployed suit actor), with MA 20 and +6 Initiative.

Special equipment (suit systems): VR interface, high reflex boost, comm suite (military radio, cell, scrambler, laser communicator), sensor suite (backup visual sensors, TV camera, two 67cm horn periscope extensions), IR baffling, ECM and ECCM (right/left legs), 2 EMP capacitors (50% short chance on absorb), climber claws on hands and feet (7D10; 8D10 kick), laser and radar detectors, 4 ribbon + IR smoke canisters.

Stock armament: Tsunami GL in the right arm (3 extra clips); Oni autoshotgun in the left arm (1 extra clip); retractable mono-sword in each arm (MELEE +1, 8D10 AP, shatters 30% on a fumble); 12.7mm MG on the right arm exterior (2 belts); light ATGM on the left arm exterior (HW +2, 12D10 HEAT, 4m burst, 1000m; 2 extra shots); hand-held EMG-83 railgun (5D10+10 AP, 10 shots, 1000m).

Reference Book collation (secondary; cross-check at table): SIB +6 / DFB +3; punch 6D10, crush 7D10, kick 9D10; Toughness −12; per-zone SDP head/arms 13, legs 26, torso 39.
